summary: Iteration 121 - Inline Field Editing in Lead Modal (C3) + Custom Pipeline Stage Names (C6): Both features verified and working. Inline editing works for 6 fields (Project Title, Description, Status, Estimated Value, Budget, Timeline) with pencil icon on hover, click-to-edit, save/cancel buttons, Escape to cancel, and Enter to save. Pipeline Settings tab in Settings page shows 5 stage inputs with Save and Reset functionality, localStorage persistence verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 121 features verified: (1) Inline Field Editing in LeadDetailModal Overview tab - 6 fields with data-testid format inline-field-{fieldName}, inline-input-{fieldName}, inline-save-{fieldName}, inline-cancel-{fieldName}. (2) Pipeline Settings in Settings page - 5 stage inputs with data-testid format pipeline-input-{status}, pipeline-save-btn, pipeline-reset-btn. localStorage key 'kolor_stage_names' stores custom names.

lead_modal_opens.details: Lead detail modal opens when clicking on a lead from CRM Alerts section

project_details_section.details: Project Details section found with data-testid='project-details-section'

click_to_edit_mode.details: Clicking on budget field's clickable area enters edit mode - input becomes visible

save_cancel_buttons.details: Save (checkmark) and Cancel (X) buttons visible in edit mode

escape_to_cancel.details: Pressing Escape key cancels edit mode and closes input

pipeline_tab_exists.details: Pipeline tab visible in Settings sidebar with Funnel icon

pipeline_tab_content.details: Pipeline tab content visible with data-testid='settings-pipeline-tab'

save_stage_names_button.details: Save Stage Names button found with data-testid='pipeline-save-btn'

reset_to_defaults_button.details: Reset to Defaults button found with data-testid='pipeline-reset-btn'

localStorage_reset.details: localStorage cleared after clicking Reset to Defaults
